creator: tomaszg@onlydomains.com
text:
OnlyDomains would be honoured to be listed as an internet service provider on FreeBSD - http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/isp.html
OnlyDomains
OnlyDomains provides global domain name registration from Napier, New Zealand. Our goal is to help register our customers globally with domain names, global hosting, phone numbers, virtual offices, and trademark registration services. As huge fans of FreeBSD we value the stability and security offered by FreeBSD and fully support the continued development of FreeBSD.
